title: Get partners by an asset
content:
Use this endpoint to get the partners that you have shared a particular asset with. You need to be an Admin user of the Business Center. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| | Endpoint path | /v1.2/bc/asset/partner/get/ | /v1.3/bc/asset/partner/get/ | | Request parameter data type | `bc_id`: number
`asset_id`: number | `bc_id`: string
`asset_id`: string | | Response parameter data type | `bc_id`: number | `bc_id`: string | ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/asset/partner/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{35%}|Description{35%}| |---|---|---| |Access-Token{Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required} | string | Business Center ID. | | asset_type {Required} | string | Asset type. Enum values: `ADVERTISER`, `CATALOG`. | | asset_id {Required} | string | Asset ID. Ad account ID when `asset_type` is `ADVERTISER`. Catalog ID when `asset_type` is` CATALOG`. | | filtering | object | Filtering object | #| keyword {Required} | string | Partner name keyword that you want to filter by. | | page | number | Current page number. Default value: 1. | | page_size | number | Page size. Default value: 10. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --get -H "Access-Token:xxx" \ --data-urlencode "bc_id=BC_ID" \ --data-urlencode "asset_type=ASSET_TYPE" \ --data-urlencode "asset_id=ASSET_ID" \ --data-urlencode "filtering={\"keyword\": \"KEYWORD\"}" \ --data-urlencode "page=PAGE" \ --data-urlencode "page_size=PAGE_SIZE" \ https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/asset/partner/get/ (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number | Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string | Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object| Returned data. | #|list|object[]|List of partners.| ##|bc_name|string|Partner name. | ##|bc_id|string|Partner ID.| #|page_info|object|Pagination information. | ##|page|number|Current page number. | ##|page_size|number|Page Size. | ##|total_number|number|Total number of results. | ##|total_page|number|Total pages of results.| |request_id|string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "message": "OK", "code": 0, "data": {} } (/code) ```
